content: We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs.rss We Work Remotely: Remote jobs in design, programming, marketing and more en-US 60 Native Camp: Online English Teacher Anywhere in the World Beograd (Belgrade) All Other Remote Contract <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0077/5564/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Japan <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="https://nativecamp.net/tutors/?cc=gb-wwr">https://nativecamp.net/tutors/?cc=gb-wwr</a> </p> <div><strong>About us:&nbsp;</strong></div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>Native Camp is Japan’s No.1 Online English Service counting the highest number of both teachers and students who are learning the English language through our platform. Since 2017, we have started hiring teachers from all around the world, and we have created an environment that makes it easy for them to work and earn while having full flexibility.</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>We are continuously expanding, introducing new features and teaching materials, and as a result of these efforts, more than 1.3 million members are using our service. Lessons are provided via a unique language platform developed by our company. We have simplified our application process and made it as quick as possible, so joining our team of teachers has never been easier. Join us today to experience the benefits that we provide.</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div><strong>ONLINE ENGLISH TEACHER</strong></div> <div><em>(Home-Based job position)</em></div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div><strong>What we offer:</strong></div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>・Complete flexibility (24/7)</div> <div>・100% remote</div> <div>・Easy-to-follow teaching materials provided</div> <div>・No minimum hours per week required</div> <div>・Frequent incentives offered</div> <div>・No CV or experience required</div> <div>・Online support available</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div><strong>Requirements:</strong></div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>・English Proficiency</div> <div>・Laptop or PC with a webcam</div> <div>・Headset with a microphone</div> <div>・Stable Internet connection and speed</div> <div>・Quiet environment and plain background</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div><strong>Application Process:</strong></div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>・Apply through our website</div> <div>・Do the English Proficiency Test</div> <div>・Do the System Check and the Demo Lesson</div> <div>・Complete your profile</div> <div>・Start Teaching</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>The whole application process is done online, via desktop. Just follow step by step and the system will guide you through it.</div> <div>&nbsp;</div> <div>If you have any questions please contact us via our website (Contact Us page).</div> <div><br><br></div> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/native-camp-online-english-teacher-34">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/native-camp-online-english-teacher-34</a></p> Fri, 17 Jul 2026 07:47:27 +0000 Sun, 16 Aug 2026 07:47:27 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/native-camp-online-english-teacher-34 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/native-camp-online-english-teacher-34 Steady Vision: Web Designer Massachusetts Adobe Creative Suite, Analytics, CMS Development, Architect, Architecture, Blog Writing, Analytics Tools, Editing, Audio Editing, and Brand Identity Design Front-End Programming Full-Time <img src="https://we-work-remotely.imgix.net/logos/0171/5856/logo.gif?ixlib=rails-4.0.0&w=50&h=50&dpr=2&fit=fill&auto=compress" /> <p> <strong>Headquarters:</strong> Boston, Massachusetts, United States <br /><strong>URL:</strong> <a href="http://steadyvision.com">http://steadyvision.com</a> </p> <strong>Description</strong><br><p>We are digital marketing agency seeking a UI/UX designer who exhibits strong attention to detail and thrives in a dynamic environment. We’re looking for someone who is passionate about what they do and enjoys working with a small team to create meaningful digital experiences.</p><p><br></p><p><strong>You’re A Fit If…</strong></p><ul> <li>You embrace change and are eager to learn and grow.</li> <li>You are organized and a good manager of time.</li> <li>You think and act creatively to solve problems.</li> <li>You are a good communicator and collaborator.</li> <li>You are willing to go the extra mile.</li> </ul><p><br></p> <p><strong>What You’ll Be Doing…</strong></p><p>Activities primarily focus on designing visual frameworks and responsive user interfaces. This covers all areas of digital and interactive design ranging from low fidelity wireframes to full scale visual systems and everything in between.<br></p><p><br></p><br><br><strong>Requirements</strong><br><p><strong>You Must...</strong></p><ul> <li>Be a designer of everything digital (websites, email marketing, social media, etc.)</li> <li>Believe content and users inform design and interaction.</li> <li>Understand the interplay of design and development and have an appreciation for user experience.</li> <li>Have a working knowledge of responsive design principles.</li> <li>Work with Adobe Creative suite.</li> </ul><p><strong>It Would Be Nice If You Have...</strong></p><ul> <li>Experience with, or exposure to, HTML and CSS.</li> <li>Been directly involved in designing mobile and/or responsive websites.</li> <li>Exposure to open source based CMS (e.g. Drupal, ExpressionEngine, Joomla, WordPress).</li> <li>Experience with any of the following systems: HubSpot, Magento, Shopify, SquareSpace.</li> <li>Familiarity with customizing social media channels.</li> <li>Professional certifications and/or educational degrees.</li> </ul><p><br></p><br><br><strong>Benefits</strong><br><ul> <li>Small team in an entrepreneurial environment (be heard and have an impact).</li> <li>Scheduling flexibility and remote working opportunities.</li> <li>Company sponsored learning opportunities (e.g. resources, conferences, etc.).</li> <li>Casual attire, team lunches, group outings, free coffee (always!) and beer (occasionally!).</li> <li>Employee benefits (health/dental/life/disability insurance, 529 college fund &amp; 401K options).</li> </ul> <p><strong>To apply:</strong> <a href="https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/steady-vision-web-designer">https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/steady-vision-web-designer</a></p> Thu, 16 Jul 2026 21:08:09 +0000 Sat, 15 Aug 2026 21:08:09 +0000 https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/steady-vision-web-designer https://weworkremotely.com/remote-jobs/steady-vision-web-design
